mascot_message: Hi! I've updated our Community rules. Before we continue, please read and confirm them so we're on the same page! (´• ω •`)
text:
USER AGREEMENT AND PRIVACY POLICY FOR CL (Clegendary Launcher)

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
This Agreement governs the relationship between the user and the developer of CL (Clegendary Launcher). By downloading, installing, or using the Launcher, you unconditionally agree to all the terms of this agreement. If you do not agree with any provision, you must immediately cease using the software and delete it.

2. LICENSE AND RIGHTS
You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use the Launcher solely for personal, non-commercial purposes. The Launcher is provided free of charge.

PERMITTED:
• Decompiling and analyzing the source code exclusively for educational and informational purposes.

PROHIBITED:
• Using the Launcher's source code or resources to create derivative products, clones, or competitive services.
• Using the software for fraud, distribution of malware, or any illegal activities.
• Selling or renting access to the Launcher.

3. PRIVACY AND DATA COLLECTION
We respect your privacy. The Launcher collects a MINIMAL amount of technical data:
• Launcher version information (to check for updates).
• We DO NOT collect passwords, personal files, browser history, or any other personal data.
• We do not share any data with third parties.

4. DISCLAIMER OF LIABILITY (AS IS)
The software is provided on an "AS IS" basis. The developer does not guarantee error-free operation of the software and is not responsible for:
• Any damages, data loss, or computer malfunctions.
• The performance of third-party mods, servers, or skins.

5. NO AFFILIATION WITH MOJANG/MICROSOFT
CL (Clegendary Launcher) is an independent project and is NOT an official product of Mojang AB or Microsoft Corporation. We encourage you to purchase a licensed version of Minecraft on the official website minecraft.net. Supporting piracy is not the goal of this software.

6. TERMINATION
The developer reserves the right to discontinue support for the Launcher or revoke your license to use it in case you violate the terms of this Agreement.

7. CHANGES TO TERMS
This agreement may be updated by the developer. Continued use of the Launcher after an update constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

8. CONTACTS
If you have any questions, you can contact the administration via Discord: clegendary.
